description_long: This guard rail consists of a series of evenly spaced vertical bars connected by a horizontal top and bottom rail, forming a sturdy linear barrier. The structure is made of dark-colored metal, likely steel, with a matte finish and a robust, industrial appearance. The base of the guard rail features squared feet that provide stability and suggest a surface-mounted or base plate anchoring method. The vertical posts are rectangular in profile and are spaced at regular intervals, providing both strength and visibility through the barrier. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. There are no reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots.
description: A sturdy, dark metal guard rail with evenly spaced vertical bars and squared feet, designed for urban safety and separation. The structure is utilitarian, with a matte finish and no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the guard rail, with all vertical bars and both squared feet visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rail and the depth of the squared feet, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the vertical bars and squared feet from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the depth of the feet, similar to view 1.
